name: ExtensionSpecimen_Container_Device
title: R5: Device resource for the container (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Specimen.container.device` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Specimen.container.device` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Specimen.container.device` 1..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Specimen.container.device` has a context of Specimen.container based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Specimen`.
Element `Specimen.container.device` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Device resource for the container (new)
element.comment:
Element `Specimen.container.device` has a context of Specimen.container based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Specimen`.
Element `Specimen.container.device` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: The device resource for the the container holding the specimen. If the container is in a holder then the referenced device will point to a parent device.
